backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor implementing e-commerce functionality: product management with reviews, per-user shopping carts, price calculation, checkout with payment methods (Cash on Delivery/UPI), and product search by name/description.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping six main requirements (yellow theme, admin interface, product display, shopping cart, payment options, search) to their implementing files and components with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of all frontend files including pages (product list, detail, cart, payment, admin), components (header, footer), hooks, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark modes with neutral grayscale palette (no yellow theme colors present in CSS variables).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with 'GLORY 123' title, root div for React mounting, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining six routes (home, product detail, cart, payment, order success, admin) with shared Layout component containing Header and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with three columns: brand description, contact info (phone 9892246308, address R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI), social media links, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with GLORY 123 branding, navigation links (Products, Admin), and shopping cart button displaying total item count badge.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing ICP backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for product search, cart management, and checkout operations, including queries for products/cart/total and mutations for adding products/reviews/cart items and processing checkout.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a yellow/gold color theme for both light and dark modes, including primary colors, backgrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page with a form to add new products, validating inputs and using the useAddProduct mutation to submit product data (name, category, price, description).
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with product details, quantity controls, and total price calculation, with navigation to checkout or back to shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page showing success message with options to continue shopping or view cart after successful order placement.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment selection page offering Cash on Delivery or UPI payment methods, with UPI ID display/copy functionality and checkout mutation to complete the order.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page component that displays individual product information, allows adding to cart, and enables users to submit reviews with toast notifications for success/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListPage.tsx: Product listing page with hero banner, search functionality, category filtering, and a grid display of products with placeholder images cycling through three variants.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, Apple-inspired typography, container queries, animations, and extended theme utilities for the e-commerce UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking the GLORY 123 e-commerce site features including yellow theme, product management, reviews, cart, payment options (COD/UPI), search, and contact info with architectural notes and feature implementation status.
